title: Project Report: CMDB + Event Management Integration — ServiceNow Developer / Administrator
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Populate CMDB with server CIs, integrate monitoring alerts to auto-create incidents with enrichment.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**CMDB + Event Management Integration** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for ServiceNow Developer / Administrator. Duration: 4–5 weeks. Populate CMDB with server CIs, integrate monitoring alerts to auto-create incidents with enrichment. Tools: ServiceNow PDI, CMDB, Integration Hub.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: CMDB CI classes and relationships
Objective: Discovery or manual CI import
Objective: Event rules for alert → incident
Objective: CI impact analysis on changes
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
ServiceNow Developer / Administrator portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a ServiceNow Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a ServiceNow Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: CMDB
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: CMDB** *(Level: Advanced)*

CI model setup. Complete these tasks: Server class; Relationships. Deliverable for this phase: CMDB populated.

Code Reference:
```text

- [ ] Relationships
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### Where to use it

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: CMDB export; Event rule config; Impact analysis demo; Architecture doc. Skills demonstrated: CMDB, Event Management, Integration. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: CMDB export
Deliverable: Event rule config
Deliverable: Impact analysis demo
Deliverable: Architecture doc
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits CMDB export and passes the rubric.
